race.comment: SIR RANDOLPH (5) was well supported in town at the latest, only just missing the frame in a blanket finish. Comes through some strong form races and is knocking on the door. Strikes an easier assignment and is perfectly placed to break through. SERINITE ILLUSION (3) registered a strong win at Balaklava two runs ago. Not disgraced last time out when rattling home late again to only be beaten a tick over 2L. Expect him to drift back again and be flashing late under Holder. MIKKI TANGO (4) recorded a gutsy maiden victory last time out over 2050m at Strathalbyn. Drops back in trip but the handy draw will assist. Sure to make his presence felt. BLUE ISLES (12) was on the speed from the rails draw last start and battled on well to finish third over this trip at Balaklava. Peaking now and is ready to go a couple better.
